project_type: TypeScript monorepo - interconnected 13-app ecosystem (email, chat, docs, drive, video, social, etc.)
language: TypeScript (strict mode, ES2022 target, ESNext modules)
build_system: pnpm workspaces + turbo for task orchestration. Packages in packages/, apps in apps/, services in services/.
test_framework: vitest (global mode, v8 coverage). Tests co-located in __tests__/ dirs or .test.ts suffix next to source.
verification_instructions: Run pnpm typecheck and pnpm test for the affected packages. All gates: install, typecheck, test, build, lint.
setup_instructions: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile in workspace root. Node 22+ required.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. No Docker daemon needed for unit tests. Kafka/Meili/Qdrant are mocked in tests. Real embedding provider not available - tests use mock embedders.
contribution_requirements: Small reviewable diffs (<=500 LOC per PR). Performance budgets are gates. All gates must pass: install, typecheck, test, build, lint, audit.
key_patterns: Zod schemas for validation/types. Class-based services with constructor DI. In-memory stores for v1 (production requires persistence adapters). Barrel exports in index.ts. Services follow pattern: interface -> class -> tests. HybridSearchPipeline orchestrates BM25+vector+reranker. SearchRouter in search-indexer orchestrates the full search API. Permission filtering is post-query defense-in-depth. Kafka-based event consumption with outbox pattern.
directory_structure: packages/search/src/services/ - core search logic (hybrid, BM25, vector, permissions, NL query, saved searches, proactive). packages/search/src/core/ - foundational components (inverted index, BM25 ranker, autocomplete, analytics). services/search-indexer/src/ - Kafka consumer service that indexes content, plus API routers for search and proactive endpoints. packages/ai/ - AI engine with model routing, streaming, providers.
